basics.description:
Deploy **UTL-X Transformation Engine — Starter** into your Azure subscription.

**Starter plan:** 8 worker threads, up to 2 auto-scaling instances. Handles 10+ integrations at ~40K msg/s.

Billing is handled automatically through your Azure bill. A 14-day free trial is included.

location.label: Region
location.toolTip: Azure region for all resources. Choose a region close to your workloads.

options.text: Starter plan: 8 concurrent worker threads, up to 2 auto-scaling instances. Transforms JSON, XML, CSV, YAML, and OData natively with 652 stdlib functions, schema validation, and pipeline chaining. Upgrade to Professional for 32 workers and up to 10 instances.

elements.name: cpuCores
elements.label: CPU Cores per instance
elements.toolTip: CPU allocation per container instance. Higher values support more concurrent transformations.

elements.name: memoryGi
elements.label: Memory per instance
elements.toolTip: Memory allocation per container instance. XML/JSON transformation expands messages 10-50x in memory. Choose based on your largest message size.

options.text: XML and JSON messages expand 10-50x in memory during transformation (UDM parsing). A 100 KB XML message uses ~5-10 MB of heap. With 8 concurrent workers, choose memory accordingly.

elements.name: minReplicas
elements.label: Minimum instances
elements.toolTip: Set to 0 for scale-to-zero (no cost when idle, ~10s cold start). Set to 1 for always-on (recommended for production).
